node.statement: APPROX A4 (LLL projection): Project out all n>0 Landau levels. EXACT WHEN: hbar*omega_c >> V_Coulomb, i.e. LL gap >> interaction scale. For GaAs: hbar*omega_c ~ 20K/T * B, V_Coulomb ~ e^2/(eps*ell) ~ 50*sqrt(B[T]) K. At B=10T: 200K vs 160K — ratio ~1.3, NOT parametrically large. This is a SIGNIFICANT approximation. After projection: kinetic energy = constant N*(hbar*omega_c/2), dropped. H_LLL = Pi_0 V_ee Pi_0. ENTIRE physics determined by Coulomb interaction alone. [P11-Girvin p.25-27, footnote 8; P20-Faugno for 10-20% LL mixing corrections]
